data.name: Health Insurance
data.description: Comprehensive health insurance coverage for employees and their families.

data.name: Vision Insurance
data.description: Eye care and vision correction coverage.

data.name: Retirement Plan (401k)
data.description: Tax-deferred retirement savings plan with employer matching.

data.description: Monthly allowance for home office equipment and internet.
